samples.xml_description:
<module id="parallel2serial">
    <description>Implement a module for parallel-to-serial conversion, where every four input bits are converted to a serial one bit output (from MSB to LSB). The output signal valid_out is set to 1 to indicate the availability of valid serial output. When valid_out = 1, the most significant bit of d is output, and the remaining three bits are output sequentially in the following 3 cycles.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operations.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="d" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit parallel data input.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Valid signal indicating the availability of serial output.</output>
        <output id="dout">Serial output representing the converted data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="WIDTH" value="4"/>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="cnt" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[2:0]">Counter register.</reg>
        <reg id="data" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[3:0]">Data register.</reg>
        <reg id="valid" type="sequential_logic">Valid signal register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <assignment id="dout" value="data[3]"/> // Assign the most significant bit of data to dout.
        <always>
            <if condition="rst_n == 1">
                <statement>
                    <assign id="cnt" value="cnt + 1"/> // Increment the counter by 1.
                    <assign id="valid" value="cnt == 3"/> // Set valid to 1 if cnt is 3.
                    <if condition="cnt == 3">
                        <statement>
                            <assign id="data" value="d"/> // Load the parallel input data to the data register.
                            <assign id="cnt" value="0"/> // Reset the counter to 0.
                        </statement>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <statement>
                            <assign id="cnt" value="cnt + 1"/> // Increment the counter by 1.
                            <assign id="valid" value="0"/> // Set valid to 0.
                            <assign id="data" value="{data[2:0], data[3]}"/> // Shift the data register to the left by one bit, and shift the most significant bit to the least significant bit.
                        </statement>
                    </else>
                </statement>
            </if>
        </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
